metadata.title: Montana Golf Courses
metadata.description: Comprehensive dataset of all Montana golf courses with coordinates for mapping
metadata.source: Montana State Golf Association (msgagolf.org) + supplementary research

courses.description: Airport Golf Club is a 9-hole private club open to the public. Course is closed to the public Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday evenings. The course itself is a unique challenge with high cottonwood trees, as well as undulating and high-quality putting surfaces.

Anaconda Country Club is nestled just outside of Anaconda, Montana and features 3,020 yards of golf from the longest tees for a par of 35. The 9-hole course offers an 18-hole feel with differing tee boxes for the 'front' and 'back' nine. Mill Creek and three man-made ponds make the course unique and challenging.

Anaconda Hills Golf Course began as a 9-hole course with sand greens in the 1920s for Anaconda Smelter Company employees. The City of Great Falls acquired it in the 1970s, adding grass greens, and expanded to 18 holes in 1992. The course, playing to a par of 69 and just under 5,700 yards, features a hilly, tree-lined front nine with small, sloping greens, and a newer back nine with ravines, natural rough, and water.

courses.address: 4156 US Highway 12, White Sulphur Springs, MT 59645
courses.description: Arrowhead Meadows Golf Course is a 9-hole municipal course, completed in 1989, located just south of White Sulphur Springs in the beautiful Smith River Valley. The rural setting offers beginning golfers an uncrowded course and yet the small greens make the course a challenge to the low handicappers.

On the outskirts of Havre, nestled in the beautiful scenery of North Central Montana, Beaver Creek Golf Course offers a 9 Hole Course that is friendly to all skill levels. It features 3192 yards of golf from the longest tees for a par of 36.

The Beaverhead Golf Course was built in 1963 by local ranchers and businessmen. The 100 acres of grass fairways, bent grass, and large greens are spread out through nine holes, with a small creek running through two fairways. Poplar, pine, and willow trees have grown to line the fairways and the greens. The Beaverhead’s practice facility, which includes a driving range with grass hitting areas and a spacious putting green, is perfect to help polish up your game. You will find the course in great shape all summer long, thanks to our amazing greens keeper and staff! One of the most friendly courses in Southwest Montana, the Beaverhead Golf Course is host to many local gatherings. Providing a full service bar, snacks, spacious dining area, and a large deck, great for watching the sunset.

courses.address: 2100 Black Otter Road, Big Sky, MT 59716
courses.description: The Big Sky Resort Golf Course is an award-winning 18-hole, par 72 course designed by Arnold Palmer in the early 1970s. Situated at 6,500 feet above sea level, it offers classic links-style golf with stunning mountain views of Lone Peak and winds along the wildlife-rich banks of the West Fork of the Gallatin River.

Bill Roberts Golf Course, originally established in 1925 as Last Chance Golf Course, is an 18-hole championship public course located in Helena, Montana. It features 6,782 yards from the tips, 43 bunkers, and 9 water hazards, offering a challenging yet scenic experience. The course was expanded to 18 holes in 1976 by Robert Graves and later improved in 1990 by Carl Thusen.

Black Bull is a private golf community on 500 stunning acres in the heart of the Gallatin Valley in Bozeman, Montana. The luxury real estate at Black Bull comprises 398 residences, a world-class 18-hole championship golf course, and a private members club for sports, wellness, and recreation.
Located at the base of the Bridger Mountains, only ten minutes from historic downtown Bozeman, Bridger Creek enters it’s 30th year as one of Montana’s most scenic and challenging golf courses.

Buffalo Hill Golf Club is a historic public golf course in the heart of Kalispell, MT. It offers twenty-seven holes, including the Championship 18, with scenic views of the Flathead Valley and the northwest Rocky Mountains. The course rewards golfers who utilize strategy and accuracy.

Butte Country Club is a challenging par-70 course with 18 holes, offering a test of skill for seasoned golfers. It boasts outstanding views of nearby mountain ranges and is kept in good condition with mature trees.

Cabinet View Golf Club is a majestic, challenging 18-hole golf course with spectacular scenery and breathtaking views of the Cabinet Mountains located in beautiful Libby, Montana. It is a rural setting with beautiful views of the Cabinet Mountains, with well-kept greens and manicured fairways and rough.

Canyon River Golf Club offers a full-service golf experience with 18 holes of magnificent golf, superb amenities, and outstanding service. The course provides an unparalleled golfing experience for all skill levels, featuring fairways, water hazards, and sand traps. It is recognized as Missoula's preeminent golf course community, embodying quality and dedication in its design.

Chinook Golf & Country Club is a 9-hole public course located in Chinook, Montana. Established in 1977, it offers a par 31 layout with 2540 yards. The course is known for its well-groomed fairways and greens, providing a family-friendly golfing experience.
Choteau Country Club is a 9-hole public golf course located in Choteau, Montana. It offers scenic views of the Rocky Mountain Front and provides a family-oriented golfing experience.

Located in the Eastern Montana badlands just minutes away from Makoshika State Park, Cottonwood Country Club is a secluded 9-hole golf course known for its great layout and pristine condition. With mature cottonwood trees, elevation changes, and undulating greens, it appeals to all golfers. The club offers golf access to both members and the public.

Cottonwood Hills Golf Club is an 18-hole public course in Bozeman, Montana, known for its challenging layout and well-maintained greens. Designed by Bob Quick and opened in 1986, the course features fast greens with significant slope, strategic bunkers, elevation changes, and a meandering irrigation ditch that demand precise shot placement. It offers an enjoyable experience for golfers of varying skill levels.

courses.address: 59 Golf Course Rd, Cut Bank, MT 59427
courses.description: Just a short drive away from Glacier National Park, the Cut Bank Golf and Country Club is a 9-hole public course with a family-friendly atmosphere and beautiful views. Originally opened in 1932, it became an all-grass course in 1955.

courses.address: 838 Golf Course Road, Deer Lodge, MT 59722
courses.description: Deer Park Golf Course is a public 9-hole course located in Deer Lodge, MT. It offers a challenging yet enjoyable golfing experience with beautiful scenery, including the backdrop of Mount Powell.

courses.address: 419 Golf View Dr, Seeley Lake, MT 59868
courses.description: The Double Arrow Golf Course, one of the premier golf courses in Montana, is a true golfer’s paradise right in the heart of the Rockies. This spectacular Montana golf resort is carved among gentle rolling hills and towering Ponderosa pines, offering breathtaking views of the Swan Mountains to the east and the Mission Mountains to the west.

Eagle Bend Golf Club is a beautifully manicured 27-hole championship course forged from the dramatic Flathead Valley landscape. The three distinct nines accentuate the beauty of sweeping mountain ranges, water, and trees, offering exceptional playing conditions and layout.

Eagle Falls Golf Club is located at 25th St. & River Drive North, near Giant Springs State Park & the Lewis & Clark Interpretive Center. The course offers a variety of shots and challenges, including a 205-yard uphill par 3 and a signature par four dogleg right eighteenth with a lake. It was originally a nine-hole municipal course opened in 1953, expanded to 18 holes, and redesigned by Les Furber in 1999.

Eaglerock Golf Course offers scenic views of eastern Montana and stunning lake sunsets. The course features a rolling layout with long fairways and large greens, providing a challenging yet enjoyable experience. It is dedicated to inspiring and guiding those seeking an off-the-beaten-path experience, nestled between whispering aspen trees with inspiring views of the Rattle Snake Butte.

The Exchange City Par 3 is a non-profit 18-hole, par-3 golf course overseen by the Downtown Exchange Club. It is designed for players of all skill levels and features well-maintained greens. Profits from day-to-day operations are shared between the golf course and the City of Billings for use in parks and recreation projects.

courses.course_name: Fairmont Hot Springs Resort Golf Course
courses.description: Fairmont’s Golf Course features an outstanding 6,741 yard, 18-Hole, par 72 layouts. Fairmont’s “mile high, mile-long” 5th Hole is recognized as one of the most challenging among Montana golf courses. The green is a mile high and the Tee Box is 649 yards away, making this par 5 one of the longest holes in Montana. Fairmont’s 3rd hole features Montana’s largest green, a three-tiered 10,000 square foot putting surface.

Welcome to the Forsyth Golf & Country Club. One hundred miles east of Billings and 40 miles west of Miles City. The nine-hole golf course is a beautiful sight from Interstate 94 about 3 miles west of Forsyth. You can play an 18-hole round using different tee markers. The greens are considered to be the nicest in the area. The lush fairways have trees, water and sand traps as well as bunkers and challenging putting greens. All of these combine to make your golf game an enjoyable challenge. The course is just right for the golfing travelers that need 9 holes and a break from traveling.

Fox Ridge Golf Course is located in the Helena valley, spanning nearly 200 acres amidst the scenic Gold West Country of Montana. It offers a serene environment with inspiring views of the Sleeping Giant, Mount Helena, and the Great Divide, featuring rolling green hills, mature trees, and tranquil ponds. The course provides a challenging and scenic golfing experience for players of all skill levels.

courses.address: 1 Midvale St, East Glacier Park, MT 59434-5038
courses.description: This historic course was built by the Great Northern Railway in 1928 and named "Oom-coo-ska-pes-che" or Big Green Blanket by Chief Earl Old Person. The Glacier Park Lodge Golf Course is the oldest grass greens golf course in Montana. All 9 holes are named after former chiefs of the Blackfeet Nation. It offers magnificent mountain views, undulating greens and wide fairways.

Glacier View Golf Course is nestled in a bend of the Middle Fork of the Flathead River, just outside of Glacier National Park. It offers a challenging course with great views and affordable rates, making it a favorite among local golfers.

The Green Meadow golf course is a medium-length, tight layout providing a test of skill and enjoyment for players of all ability levels. With 10-Mile Creek traversing the golf course and an additional five water hazards, water is encountered on 11 of the 18 holes. The course is known for its meticulous maintenance and challenging layout.

The picturesque par-72 course at Hamilton Golf Club is located in Hamilton, Montana in the heart of the beautiful Bitterroot Valley. Established in 1924, the 18-hole course offers a challenging layout with several water hazards and natural obstacles, designed by James Wallinder and Jack Martin.

Harvest Hills Golf Course in Fairfield, Montana, offers a challenging 9-hole regulation course for all skill levels. It spans 3229 yards with a par of 36, a rating of 37.7, and a slope of 127. The course, opened in 1996, is located along Highway 89 and provides scenic views of the surrounding mountains.

courses.address: 225 N 7th Ave E, Three Forks, MT 59752
courses.description: Headwaters Golf Course is a public 9-hole course in Three Forks, MT, known for its impeccable conditions and challenging layout. Opened in 1987, it offers a great experience for members and guests alike.

Hickory Swing Golf Course is an 18-hole, par-60 executive course that features challenging fairways encompassing 3,371 yards on 86 acres in Great Falls, MT. Built in 1992, it is a unique spot in Great Falls with 18 short holes, making it the Treasure State's only par-60.

Butte's municipal golf course, located in Stodden Park, offers a regulation nine-hole old-style course built in 1939 and a par three course built in 1980. The regulation nine is a par 35 with two challenging par 3s, small greens that require accuracy, and different tees for the back nine. The par 3 course has a full swing on every hole with excellent greens.

Hilands Golf Club is the oldest private golf club in Yellowstone County, opening in 1922. The nine-hole course is reputed for its excellent conditions and manicured greens, offering a classic parkland-style layout with a variety of shot-making opportunities and challenges.

Indian Springs Montana features a beautifully maintained 18-hole championship course designed for golfers of all skill levels. With sweeping fairways, native grasses, and breathtaking views, every round feels like a true Montana escape. Links-style design with narrow fairways and native features, multiple elevation changes and panoramic vistas, a calm, uncrowded playing experience.

Iron Horse Golf Club is a private golf club nestled in Whitefish, Montana, featuring an 18-hole Tom Fazio-designed course. The course offers bluegrass fairways and bent grass greens with dramatic views of the Montana Rockies and Whitefish Lake. It stretches to 7,028 yards from the championship tees with a par of 71.

Built in 1980, Jawbone Creek Country Club is a Frank Hummel designed nine-hole course in Harlowton. It is a rolling course known for having an entire cemetery enclosed within it, and tricky greens surrounded by large mounds and sand-traps. With three mountain ranges within view, it offers a scenic and challenging golf experience.

Judith Shadows is located on the northeastern edge of Lewistown, nestled in a valley shadowed by the Judith Mountains. It offers beautiful views of the golf course and surrounding mountains. Judith Shadows is Central Montana's only 18-hole golf course.
King Ranch offers a challenging 18 Hole layout, Beautiful Clark Fork river scenery and good old western Montana hospitality. Enjoy your next round of golf in a relaxed environment at a great price.

This mature Montana 18 hole golf course is a joy to play for every level of golfer. The course measures a challenging 6,802 yards from the back tees to a relaxing 5,146 yards from the front. You will be delighted by the antelope grazing on the luscious green fairways and waterfowl gliding on the lakes and ponds. This is a golf experience no one should miss.

Lakeview Country Club was established in 1984. It is a 9-hole, par 36, semi-private course designed by Frank Hummel. The course features two ponds and is located near Lake Baker, offering beautiful views and wide-open skies in Eastern Montana.

courses.designer: Dick Watson, Keith Hellstrom, Carl Thuesen
courses.description: Larchmont is an 18-hole championship golf course located in the heart of the Missoula valley. Well known for its immaculate playing conditions, large greens, and challenging layout, it offers a scenic and challenging experience for players of all skill levels.

A premier 18 hole golf course nestled in Laurel Montana. Our course is Montana’s best-kept secret, with heavily-treed holes, challenging but rewarding hazards, and beautiful landscaping maintained by the experts.

courses.address: 4915 Lower Miller Creek Rd, Missoula, MT 59803
courses.description: Located in the heart of the city, Linda Vista Golf Course offers a unique golfing experience. This public, executive-style course is perfect for golfers of all skill levels. With 9 holes spread over 1745 yards, it provides a compact yet challenging layout. Designed by renowned architect John Galiher in 1994, the course showcases his artistic vision. Whether you prefer to ride in a power cart or walk the course, Linda Vista accommodates both options. Rental clubs are also available for those who want to travel light. Practice your swing at the driving range before hitting the fairways. Enjoy the picturesque surroundings as you navigate through the course, making your golfing adventure at Linda Vista truly memorable.

Situated along the Yellowstone River with panoramic views of the Absaroka and Crazy Mountains, Livingston's Golf Course setting is a one of a kind, making the golf experience that much more special. LGC is a 9-hole golf course, which offers two sets of tees for both men and women. Off the tee, the layout itself is fairly forgiving, but the uniquely built greens and natural undulations of the fairways provide a sufficient challenge for golfers of all abilities.

Madison Meadows Golf Course is a hometown favorite, offering a welcoming and enjoyable experience for local individuals and families. Nestled in the scenic town of Ennis, Montana, Madison Meadows is a challenging 9-hole, par-36 course that spans over 3,200 yards from the back tees. Designed by architect Frank Hummel, the course provides a rewarding and enjoyable experience for golfers of all skill levels, with well-maintained fairways, picturesque views, and a layout that keeps every round interesting.

Marian Hills Golf Course is a 9-hole public course in Northern Montana, offering a traditional links experience with challenging play, large undulating greens, and well-placed bunkers. It provides terrific views and well-groomed fairways, making it a friendly yet difficult course for all skill levels.

Tucked away in the natural beauty of the Marias River Valley near Shelby, Montana, Marias Valley Golf & Country Club has eighteen championship holes that consistently rank among the top public courses in Montana. A course where pace of play is almost never an issue, we have 4 sets of tees that can challenge any level of golfer and ancient cottonwood trees that seal in the natural beauty of the hi-line plains and river valley.

Meadow Creek Golf Course is a 9-hole, par-3 public course located in Fortine, Montana. It offers beautiful scenery and a family-friendly golfing experience. The course is part of Jerry's Bar & Restaurant, which has been locally owned and operated since 1966.

courses.address: 490 St Andrews Dr, Columbia Falls, MT 59912
courses.description: Meadow Lake Golf Course is the Flathead Valley’s leading 18-hole championship golf course, located at Meadow Lake Golf Resort on the west edge of Columbia Falls. Rated by Golf Digest as a 4-1/2 Star Course and one of the best public play golf courses in Montana, it offers a challenging and delightful experience.

courses.address: 300 Country Club Blvd, Great Falls, MT 59404
courses.designer: William Diddel, Carl Thuesen, Tom Vardon
courses.description: Meadow Lark Country Club, located along the Missouri River in Great Falls, Montana, is a private 18-hole championship golf course. Known for its fast, undulating greens, the course challenges even experienced players with a mix of false fronts, terraces, and strategic bunkering.

Mission Mountain Golf Club in Ronan, Montana, is nestled at the base of the beautiful Mission Mountains and is known as the "Jewel" of the Mission Valley. It offers a challenging 18-hole course with lush fairways and beautiful greens, providing both scenic views and an engaging golf experience.

courses.address: 3850 Old US Highway 93 S, Missoula, MT 59804-7342
courses.description: Missoula Country Club is a total golf experience with mature trees, fast greens and tight fairways. The course has a variety of tees for juniors, ladies, men, and seniors. The Missoula Country Club takes pride in being a premier course in Western Montana. The superbly manicured greens and mature tree-lined fairways make the course both beautiful and challenging, while still offering an exceptional golf experience for all golfers, from the novice to the avid player.

Forged from the Flathead Valley landscape, two distinct nines are sculpted from drastically different types of land. The front pays homage to rolling Scottish links-style golf while the serene back nine plays through elevation changes as it wraps around the Stillwater River. Designed by two-time US Open Champion Andy North, the golf course is a true masterpiece in the heart of Northwest Montana.

Old Baldy Golf Course is a great 9-hole course in Townsend, Montana, featuring three different sets of tees and operating on an 'Honor System' with no ProShop. It offers terrific views and challenging play for golfers of all skill levels, with well-groomed fairways and greens.

Old Works Golf Course is an 18-hole public course designed by Jack Nicklaus. It is known for its unique layout, incorporating the historic copper smelter site with black slag bunkers and Warm Springs Creek. The course offers a challenging yet enjoyable experience in a scenic Montana setting.

courses.address: 338 Big Timber Loop Rd, Big Timber, MT 59011
courses.description: Overland Golf Course, located in Big Timber, Montana, was founded in 1975 and opened in 1976. This 9-hole course, with a second set of tees for an 18-hole feel, is nestled at the base of the Crazy Mountains, offering beautiful views and abundant wildlife.

Pine Meadows Golf Course is a beautifully groomed nine-hole golf course located in Lewistown, Montana. It offers a challenging yet scenic experience with rolling terrain and stunning views. Originally opened in 1948 and designed by William Diddel, it became public in 1997 and is now part of the Elks Pine Meadows facility, offering golf, events, and dining.

Pine Ridge Golf Course is a beautiful 9-hole public course located in Roundup, Montana. Designed by Frank Hummel, it opened in 1982 and features 2,849 yards of golf for a par of 36. The course offers a challenging yet enjoyable experience for golfers.
Plentywood Golf Club is nestled in the northeast corner of Montana. It is a scenic 9-hole course with practice facilities and a welcoming clubhouse, perfect for locals and visitors.

Open to the public since 1938 and a Flathead Valley favorite for decades, its twenty-seven breathtaking holes boast spectacular lake and mountain views and comprise the only golf course with fairways adjacent to the shores of Flathead Lake, the largest natural freshwater lake west of the Mississippi. Polson Bay Golf Course offers superior value in a relaxed atmosphere and has been credited with a 4STAR RATING in ‘Places to Play’ by Golf Digest.

Located in central Montana, the Pondera Golf Course is a nine-hole layout in Conrad that was built in the year 1960. In the middle of prime farmland, the course offers great views and a fun experience for the whole family. Golfers will find an accessible course with a number of unique challenges, not least of which is the occasional burst of wind.

Ponderosa Butte Public Golf Course, opened in May of 1992, is a challenging links-style course featuring 9 holes with four distinct tee options per hole. It offers a picturesque setting, often with deer and pheasant, and boasts excellent practice facilities including a large practice green and irrigated driving range.

Prairie Farms Golf Course is a 9-hole course located in the trees along the scenic Milk River 4 miles east of Havre, Montana, on the Baltrusch family farm. The back nine is currently under construction. The club house offers lunch, pizza, beer, and wine, with golf merchandise and lessons available.

Established in 1980, Pryor Creek Golf Club has a philosophy based on enjoyment of the game of golf and helping the game grow. The club is a semi-private membership that boasts two very distinct 18-hole golf courses. The facility itself is nestled adjacent to Pryor Creek, just 13 miles northeast of Montana’s largest city, Billings, providing a peaceful golfing experience for golfers of all abilities.

courses.address: 828 Upper Continental Drive, Red Lodge, MT 59068
courses.description: The Red Lodge Mountain Golf Course is a public 18-hole course nestled in the basin of the Beartooth Mountains, offering exceptional views. Designed by Bob Baldock, it features well-manicured holes stretching over 6,780 yards, captivating players with stunning vistas and sweeping landscapes.

Rising Sun Golf Course is a Johnny Miller-designed championship course located at the Mountain Sky Guest Ranch in Emigrant, Montana. The 18-hole, par-72 course is beautifully incorporated into the landscape of rolling hills and natural grasses of Paradise Valley, and features stunning views of the Absaroka and Gallatin mountain ranges. The course is also the first in Montana to become a certified Audubon Cooperative Sanctuary.

courses.address: 46 Golf Course Road, Thompson Falls, MT 59873
courses.description: River's Bend Golf Course is a challenging 9-hole golf course located along the beautiful Clark Fork River. The course is designed so that every third hole, you come back to the clubhouse. Notable features include Hole 2 running along the Clark Fork River, and Hole 6, famous for "Igor," a dropoff to the right of the fairway.

Riverside Country Club is an 18-hole golf course located in Bozeman, Montana. The course has a par of 70 and a yardage of 6790 from the black tees. Additional details regarding course type, rating, slope, designer, and year opened are not publicly available without login.

Rock Creek Cattle Company is an 18-hole private golf course designed by Tom Doak, located amid a 30,000-acre working ranch in Deer Lodge, Montana. The course is known for its stunning natural setting, with the design carved from wild terrain and crisscrossed by superb fly fishing streams. It has consistently been ranked as one of the best golf courses in Montana and the U.S.

A spacious 9-hole course located west of Broadus, Montana, featuring rolling hills and bluffs. The course offers challenging play with several elevated greens and can easily be walked or carts are available for rent.
Scobey Golf Course is a 9-hole public course located in Scobey, Montana. It offers a peaceful round in the northeast corner of Montana, with a memorable layout.

Sidney Country Club is an 18 Hole Semi-Private Golf Course, located on the west edge of Sidney, Montana, on Highway 16N. We are the proud host of the American Petroleum Institute's (API) annual golf tournament, played the weekend after Father's Day. We offer public tee times 7 days a week, but cater to our Members with Annual Golf & Social Memberships available to Individuals, Couples, Seniors, Juniors & Families.

courses.address: 345 Signal Point Rd, Fort Benton, MT 59442
courses.description: Signal Point Golf Club promises golfers a truly memorable experience! From the first tee to the ninth green, our superbly manicured course in North central Montana, presents a challenge to the accomplished player, yet is considered a very player-friendly course for beginners. Designed by Norman H. Woods and built in 1969, the course was recently redesigned to include new forward tee boxes. Signal Point is a classic style golf course featuring large, elevated, undulating greens that are well bunkered. Overlooking the Wild & Scenic Upper Missouri River, Signal Point offers magnificent views of the Northern plains and Rocky Mountain Island Chains. Our combination of price, excellent course conditions and service truly makes Signal Point Golf Club Montana's best golf value.

Designed by Tom Weiskopf, the 18-hole championship course at Spanish Peaks Mountain Club offers a remarkable combination of playability, challenge, and stunning mountain views. It is a scenic mountain course set 7,000 feet above sea level.

Stillwater Golf Course in Columbus, Montana, is a 9-hole, semi-private course that opened in 1967. Located near the Yellowstone River, it offers tee times for the public by phone or in person up to 7 days in advance. The course is known for its relaxed atmosphere and well-maintained grounds.

On August 15, 1999, Stock Farm Club unveiled its championship golf course, an eighteen-hole masterpiece crafted by renowned architect Tom Fazio. Designed to harmonize with Montana’s rugged beauty, the course meanders through the foothills of the Sapphire Mountains, offering privacy and breathtaking vistas on nearly every hole. Widely regarded as one of the most spectacular mountain courses in North America, it provides a truly unforgettable golf experience.

Sunnyside Country Club is a semi-private golf course located just outside of Glasgow, Montana. It features a 9-hole course that plays to 18 holes with varied tee box locations for the back nine. Cherry Creek runs through a portion of the course, adding to its character.

The Briarwood Golf Club is Billing's premier private golf club, built in 1984. It features a mature, 18-hole championship golf course harmoniously designed into diverse terrain of rolling hills, creek bottoms, and open rangelands. The course offers a breathtaking view of the city of Billings and has been recognized multiple times as a top course in Montana.

Not far from Missoula, The Highlands Golf Club offers terrific views and challenging play for golfers at every skill level. Well-groomed fairways and greens keep The Highlands Golf Club difficult yet friendly, and the staff can offer tips and tricks for playing your best round. The Highlands Golf Club is a terrific choice for your regular rounds of golf or a new destination for you and friends when visiting Missoula.

The Ranch Club offers an exceptional links-style golf experience, featuring a Les Furber designed 18-hole championship course. It is Missoula's only locally owned semi-private golf club, set amidst rolling hills with panoramic mountain views, and defined by mountain lakes, golden hillsides, and large pristine greens.

courses.address: 66 Mountain Loop Road, Big Sky, MT 59716
courses.description: The Reserve at Moonlight Basin is a private, 18-hole Jack Nicklaus Signature Course located in Big Sky, Montana. Situated at 7,500 feet elevation, it offers a challenging 8000-yard layout amidst stunning mountain scenery. Jack Nicklaus himself considers it one of the most beautiful courses he's ever designed.

courses.course_name: Town & Country Club of Miles City
courses.description: The Town and Country Club features a 9-hole course with an 18-hole tee box setup along the Tongue River. It offers 6,590 yards of golf from the longest tees for a par of 72, amidst grand cottonwood trees. Designed by Herb Hash, the course opened in 1958.

courses.address: 23 Trestle Creek Drive, Saint Regis, MT 59866
courses.description: Set along the Clark Fork River, Trestle Creek finds that perfect balance that is fun for every level of golfer. Beginners will find every tee shot to be straight-forward, with only one forced carry on the signature seventh hole. Advanced players will find that the tree-lined fairways reward the straight driver. Smooth, beautifully –maintained greens are a joy to putt. Trestle Creek reflects the pride of a small, active community that embraces the outdoor lifestyle.

The University of Montana Golf Course is located one mile south of UM's main campus, on one of the last open spaces in the Missoula valley. The nine-hole triple tee course crosses flat ground and is teeming with mature tree-lined fairways. Deer and other wildlife are common as well as outlying areas reclaimed as native prairie. The U of M course is fun and affordable and caters to golfers of all ages and abilities.

Valley View Golf Club is a private golf club nestled in the heart of beautiful Bozeman, Montana. The challenging and beautiful par 70 championship golf course offers breath-taking views of the surrounding mountains from every hole. In addition to the course members have access to a full practice facility, full service pro shop and our excellent restaurant and bar.
Village Greens is a public 18-hole golf course in Kalispell, Montana, offering scenic Flathead Valley views, generous fairways, and true-rolling greens.

Whitefish Lake Golf Club offers a premier golfing experience in Whitefish, Montana, featuring two stunning courses—North and South. It provides lessons, tournaments, simulators, and a full-service restaurant, catering to all golfers. The club is set in a beautiful location, offering scenic views and a challenging yet enjoyable round of golf.

Whitetail Golf Course in Stevensville, Montana, is a scenic gem tucked within the Lee Metcalf Wildlife Refuge. This beautiful 9-hole course provides a memorable experience for golfers of every skill level, blending the challenge of the game with the serenity of nature. Each hole offers its own character, with tree-lined fairways, water hazards, and well-placed bunkers that reward both precision and creativity. As you play, don’t be surprised if you share the fairways with local wildlife—deer, elk, and a wide variety of birds often make an appearance, adding to the course’s natural charm.

WildHorse Plains Golf Course is a 9-hole golf course near Plains, MT with great views of the mountains and wide open fairways. The golf environment at WildHorse Plains Golf Course is very relaxed and family friendly.

The Wilderness Club is a Sir Nick Faldo-designed championship golf course located in Eureka, Montana, recognized as a top course in the state and nation. Situated amidst 550 acres of Rocky Mountain woodlands, it features stunning views, impeccable conditioning, and challenging play with pine-lined fairways and waste bunkers. The course offers an unforgettable experience for golfers of all abilities.

Yegen Golf Club is an 18-hole public links-style golf course located on the West End of Billings, Montana. Opened in 1992, it offers a challenging yet enjoyable experience for players of all abilities in a family-friendly environment.

courses.address: 1 Yellowstone Club Trail, Big Sky, MT 59716
courses.description: The Yellowstone Club golf course is an 18-hole championship course designed by Tom Weiskopf, offering a playable yet challenging experience amidst the awe-inspiring Rocky Mountains. The elegant clubhouse provides stunning views overlooking the 18th green, Lone Peak, the Spanish Peaks, and Gallatin Range, serving as a central hub for the golf community.

Located under the picturesque Billings rimrocks, Yellowstone Country Club has its origins in the Billings Golf and Country Club which was founded in 1914. In 1958, the club moved west along the valley to a new 630-acre site, with Robert Trent Jones Sr. engaged to lay out a new 18-hole course for the members.
